meta.title: Hermeus completes first test flight of hypersonic jet design!
meta.description:
Hermeus has officially taken flight with their Quarterhorse Mk 1 technology demonstrator, marking a significant step toward their goal of fielding fully reusable hypersonic aircraft to come in the Quarterhorse Mk 3 and beyond. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
